section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 1. BENCHMARK, RETUNE AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from the buildings sector by improving efficiency and retrofits.
verbatim_text:
## 1. BENCHMARK, RETUNE AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
- BENCHMARK 1.3 BILLION SQUARE FEET COMMUNITYWIDE BY 2026
- RETUNE 1.1 BILLION SQUARE FOOTAGE OF COMMUNITY WIDE BUILDINGS BY 2030
- RETROFIT 167,500 HOMES TO REDUCE ENERGY COSTS 28% PRIORITIZING LOW TO MODERATE INCOME (LMI) HOMES BY 2030
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple quantified sub-targets listed beneath it; fits parent policy definition.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 1. BENCHMARK, RETUNE AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS

extraction_rationale: Quantified target with deadline presented as a bullet under Approach 1.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 1. BENCHMARK, RETUNE AND RETROFIT EXISTING BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Retrofit 167,500 homes by 2030 to reduce energy costs 28%, prioritizing low- to moderate-income (LMI) homes.
parent_statement: Approach 1: Benchmark, retune, and retrofit existing buildings to reduce emissions from the buildings sector by improving efficiency and retrofits.
verbatim_text: -   RETROFIT 167,500 HOMES TO REDUCE ENERGY COSTS 28% PRIORITIZING LOW TO MODERATE INCOME (LMI) HOMES BY 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified retrofit and cost-reduction target with deadline and equity prioritization under Approach 1.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 2. EXPAND RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
verbatim_text:
## 2. EXPAND RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
-   INSTALL 61,725 KW OF SOLAR ENERGY BY 2030 ON COUNTY BUILDINGS, LAND, AND WATER...
-   INSTALL 794,000 KW OF SOLAR ENERGY BY 2030 ON COMMERCIAL AND RESIDENTIAL BUILDINGS...
-   MAXIMIZE PARTICIPATION IN UTILITY-SCALE RENEWABLE ENERGY PROGRAMS
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple bullet targets beneath it; qualifies as parent.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 2. EXPAND RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Install 61,725 kW of solar energy by 2030 on County buildings, land, and water (equivalent to 7,498 homes’ electricity use for one year).
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
verbatim_text: -   INSTALL 61,725 KW OF SOLAR ENERGY BY 2030 ON COUNTY BUILDINGS, LAND, AND WATER EQUIVALENT TO 7,498 HOMES' ELECTRICITY USE FOR ONE YEAR
extraction_rationale: Quantified deployment target with deadline under Approach 2.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 2. EXPAND RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Install 794,000 kW of solar energy by 2030 on commercial and residential buildings (equivalent to 104,014 homes’ electricity use for one year).
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
verbatim_text: -   INSTALL 794,000 KW OF SOLAR ENERGY BY 2030 ON COMMERCIAL AND RESIDENTIAL BUILDINGS EQUIVALENT TO 104,014 HOMES' ELECTRICITY USE FOR ONE YEAR
extraction_rationale: Quantified deployment target with deadline under Approach 2.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 2. EXPAND RENEWABLE ENERGY GENERATION
policy_statement: Maximize participation in utility-scale renewable energy programs.
parent_statement: Approach 2: Expand renewable energy generation, including solar installations on County and community buildings and participation in utility-scale renewable programs.
verbatim_text: -   MAXIMIZE PARTICIPATION IN UTILITY-SCALE RENEWABLE ENERGY PROGRAMS
extraction_rationale: Specific intervention (maximize participation) listed as a target under Approach 2, even if not quantified.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 3. BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings by reducing the energy use intensity of new buildings and making new County buildings ultra-low energy.
verbatim_text:
## 3. BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
- REDUCE THE ENERGY USE INTENSITY OF NEW BUILDINGS 20% BY 2030 BELOW 2020 LEVELS
extraction_rationale: Named approach with a quantified target; treated as parent for its listed target(s).

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — ENERGY & BUILDINGS — 3. BUILD ULTRA-LOW ENERGY BUILDINGS
policy_statement: Reduce the energy use intensity of new buildings 20% by 2030 below 2020 levels.
parent_statement: Approach 3: Build ultra-low energy buildings by reducing the energy use intensity of new buildings and making new County buildings ultra-low energy.
verbatim_text: - REDUCE THE ENERGY USE INTENSITY OF NEW BUILDINGS 20% BY 2030 BELOW 2020 LEVELS
extraction_rationale: Quantified energy performance target with baseline year and deadline listed under Approach 3.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — LAND USE & TRANSPORTATION — 4. REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
policy_statement: Approach 4: Reduce transportation-related fuel consumption through mode shift, fleet electrification, community EV adoption, and operational emissions reductions at airport and port.
verbatim_text:
## 4. REDUCE TRANSPORTATION-RELATED FUEL CONSUMPTION
- SHIFT 10% OF TRANSPORTATION MODE AWAY FROM SINGLE OCCUPANT VEHICLES BY 2030
- ELECTRIFY THE COUNTY FLEET: 80% OF LIGHT VEHICLES AND 50% OF PUBLIC TRANSIT BUSES BY 2030
- TRANSITION 30% OF COMMUNITYWIDE VEHICLES TO ELECTRIC POWER BY 2030
-   REDUCE GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS FROM MIAMI INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT AND PORTMIAMI OPERATIONS BY 50% AND 25%, RESPECTIVELY BY 2030
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple quantified sub-targets; qualifies as parent.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — LAND USE & TRANSPORTATION — 5. EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
verbatim_text:
## 5. EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
-   INCREASE COMMUNITY-WIDE TREE CANOPY TO 30% COVERAGE BY 2030.
-   ENSURE THAT ALL COUNTY FACILITIES WITHIN THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT BOUNDARY (UDB)... SHALL ATTAIN... AT LEAST 30% CANOPY COVERAGE... OUTSIDE THE UDB... AT LEAST 50%... BY 2030
-   REDUCE POLLUTANT LOADS TO SURFACE WATERS... TO FACILITATE RECOVERY OF SEAGRASSES TO HISTORIC LEVELS
-   DOUBLE THE TOTAL NON-WETLAND ACREAGE OF NATURAL HABITAT IN PRESERVATION
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple sub-target bullets; qualifies as parent.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — LAND USE & TRANSPORTATION — 5. EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Increase community-wide tree canopy to 30% coverage by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
verbatim_text: -   INCREASE COMMUNITY-WIDE TREE CANOPY TO 30% COVERAGE BY 2030.  [COMMUNITY RECOMMENDATION ]
extraction_rationale: Quantified canopy target with deadline under Approach 5.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — LAND USE & TRANSPORTATION — 5. EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Ensure all County facilities within the Urban Development Boundary attain at least 30% average canopy coverage and all County facilities outside the UDB attain at least 50% average canopy coverage by 2030.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
verbatim_text: -   ENSURE THAT ALL COUNTY FACILITIES WITHIN THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT BOUNDARY (UDB) (PER 2013 DELINEATION) SHALL ATTAIN AN AVERAGE OF AT LEAST 30% CANOPY COVERAGE AND ALL COUNTY FACILITIES OUTSIDE THE UDB SHALL ATTAIN AN AVERAGE OF AT LEAST 50% CANOPY COVERAGE BY 2030
extraction_rationale: Quantified, location-specific canopy requirement with a deadline under Approach 5.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — LAND USE & TRANSPORTATION — 5. EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Reduce pollutant loads to surface waters (including Biscayne Bay) to facilitate recovery of seagrasses to historic levels.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
verbatim_text: -   REDUCE POLLUTANT LOADS TO SURFACE WATERS, INCLUDING BISCAYNE BAY, TO FACILITATE RECOVERY OF SEAGRASSES TO HISTORIC LEVELS [COMMUNITY RECOMMENDATION ]
extraction_rationale: Specific intervention outcome (pollutant load reduction enabling seagrass recovery) listed under Approach 5, albeit without numeric target.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — LAND USE & TRANSPORTATION — 5. EXPAND AND PROTECT GREEN AND BLUE SPACES
policy_statement: Double the total non-wetland acreage of natural habitat in preservation.
parent_statement: Approach 5: Expand and protect green and blue spaces to increase canopy and habitat preservation and improve water quality outcomes.
verbatim_text: -   DOUBLE THE TOTAL NON-WETLAND ACREAGE OF NATURAL HABITAT IN PRESERVATION
extraction_rationale: Quantified preservation target ('double') under Approach 5 (deadline not specified in the bullet).

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — WATER & WASTE — 6. CONVERT WASTE TO ENERGY
policy_statement: Approach 6: Convert waste to energy by increasing electricity generation from wastewater cogeneration and increasing conversion of non-recycled garbage to energy while improving recycling quality.
verbatim_text:
## 6. CONVERT WASTE TO ENERGY
- 48 GWH/YEAR OF ELECTRICITY FROM COGENERATION AT WASTEWATER PLANTS BY 2030
- 50% OF NON-RECYCLED GARBAGE CONVERTED TO ENERGY BY 2030
- 10% INCREASE IN RECYCLING RATES AND CUT NON-RECYCLABLES 'CONTAMINATION' IN HALF
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple sub-target bullets; qualifies as parent.

section_header: THE 7 APPROACHES AND 2030 TARGETS — WATER & WASTE — 7. REDUCE WASTE AND WATER USE
policy_statement: Approach 7: Reduce waste and water use through per-capita landfill waste reduction and per-capita water consumption reduction by 2030.
verbatim_text:
## 7. REDUCE WASTE AND WATER USE
- REDUCE LANDFILL WASTE PER PERSON 50% BY 2030
- REDUCE WATER CONSUMPTION PER PERSON 30% BY 2030
extraction_rationale: Named approach with multiple quantified sub-targets beneath it; qualifies as parent.

section_header: INTRODUCTION
policy_statement: Miami-Dade County committed to the international Race to Zero pledge to reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 (vs. 2019) and achieve net zero by 2050.
verbatim_text: On April 22, 2021, in commemoration of the 51st anniversary of Earth Day, Mayor Daniella Levine Cava announced Miami-Dade County's commitment to the international Race to Zero... This pledge is mobilizing communities to swiftly enact measures to reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 compared to 2019 levels and then progress forward to achieve net zero by 2050.
extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to an international pledge with quantified targets and timelines.
